title: Israeli military attacks Hezbollah in Beirut's southern suburbs, statement says

snapshot.title: Israel army issues evacuation order for 29 south Lebanon villages
snapshot.description: JERUSALEM: The Israeli military on Sunday issued evacuation warnings for residents of 29 villages in southern Lebanon ahead of planned strikes, despite a ceasefire intended to halt the war with Lebanese militant group Hezbollah. The military's Arabic-language spokesman, Colonel Avichay Adraee, issued two successive warnings -- first for 13 villages, then for 16 more, with the
snapshot.author: AFP
snapshot.pageTitle: Israel army issues evacuation order for 29 south Lebanon villages | Arab News
